description: 58 - 14-01-2025 - Email from Lindsey Whyte (Director General for International, HMT) to James Roscoe (former Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy in Washington, FCDO) and others

participants.name: James Roscoe
participants.role: former Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy in Washington

text:
James Roscoe (former Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy in Washington, FCDO) and
others

From: Whyte, Lindsey - HMT

Sent: 14 January 2025 18:09

To: James Roscoe (Sensitive); Ginsberg, lan - HMT; Kantor, Suzy - HMT
Subject: intro call with Lord Mandelson

Dear all,

| had an intro call with Lord Mandelson this afternoon — a couple of quick things to feed-back.

eee

Thanks very much,

Lindsey
pot Lindsey Whyte CB (pronouns: she/her)
Director General — International
HM Treasury HM Treasury | Darlinaton Economic Campus
um: Personal
Private Secretary | JCS
PA| JCS

www.gov.uk/hm-treasury

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
